title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Q1 2024 Earnings Results
text: Enphase reported Q1 2024 revenue of $263.3 million, missing analyst estimates of $283.15 million. The company recorded a GAAP net loss of $16.1 million with non-GAAP net income of $48.0 million. Non-GAAP diluted EPS was $0.35, below the estimated $0.40. Non-GAAP gross margin was 46.2%, down from the previous quarter's 50.3%. Free cash flow generation was $41.8 million with operating expenses reduced to $82.6 million non-GAAP. The company repurchased 332,735 shares at approximately $126.21 per share. For Q2 2024 guidance, the company projected revenue between $290.0 million and $330.0 million with anticipated non-GAAP gross margins between 44.0% and 47.0%. The first quarter saw a decrease in revenue by approximately 34% in the U.S. market compared to the previous quarter, attributed to seasonal variations and a decline in demand.
